# Camper Van Gogh

> Premium VW T6.1 campervan hire in Hampshire, UK. We rent Vincent, a hand-converted 2022 Volkswagen Transporter T6.1, for adventures across the United Kingdom.

## Business at a glance

- **Name:** Camper Van Gogh
- **Tagline:** The Art of Adventure
- **Location:** Hampshire, United Kingdom
- **Email:** hello@campervangogh.co.uk
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/camper.van.gogh/
- **Service area:** United Kingdom (commonly Scotland, Wales, the Lake District, southern England)
- **Website:** https://campervangogh.com

## The vehicle: "Vincent"

- **Make / model:** Volkswagen Transporter T6.1
- **Year:** 2022
- **Transmission:** Automatic DSG
- **Sleeping capacity:** 4 adults (2 in the pop-top upper bed, 2 in the rock'n'roll lower bed)
- **Conversion features:**
  - Pop-top roof
  - Two-burner gas stove
  - Integrated fridge
  - Oven
  - Stainless steel sink
  - Leather diamond-stitched captain's seats
  - Rock'n'roll bed (lounge → double bed)
  - Rooftop solar panels
  - High-capacity leisure battery (off-grid capable)
- **Pet policy:** Pets fully welcome. No additional fees, no breed or size restrictions.

## Pricing

- **Daily rate:** £130 GBP / day
- **Security deposit:** £750 GBP (refundable)
- **Included in rate:**
  - Comprehensive insurance
  - 24/7 UK breakdown cover
  - Unlimited mileage
  - Camping furniture (table, chairs)

## Booking

- Reservations are taken online at https://campervangogh.com/booking.html
- Availability calendar is live; unavailable dates are blocked automatically.
- Payment is processed via Stripe.

## Frequently asked

- **How much per day?** £130/day plus a £750 refundable security deposit.
- **Mileage?** Unlimited.
- **Pets?** Yes — fully welcome at no extra cost.
- **Sleeps?** 4 adults.
- **Where are you based?** Hampshire, UK. Collection and return are from Hampshire.
- **Insurance?** Comprehensive insurance and 24/7 breakdown cover are included.

## Pages

- [Home](https://campervangogh.com/): About the van, features, pricing, FAQ.
- [Gallery](https://campervangogh.com/gallery.html): Interior and exterior photography, including Scotland road trip shots.
- [Book Vincent](https://campervangogh.com/booking.html): Live availability calendar and reservation flow.
